trans-unit.source: Adding AppHost project to solution...
trans-unit.target: Добавление проекта AppHost в решение...

trans-unit.source: Adding ServiceDefaults project to solution...
trans-unit.target: Добавление проекта ServiceDefaults в решение...

trans-unit.source: {0} already exists in this directory.
trans-unit.target: {0} already exists in this directory.

trans-unit.source: Aspire initialization complete!
trans-unit.target: Инициализация Aspire завершена!

trans-unit.source: Created {0}
trans-unit.target: Created {0}

trans-unit.source: Creating {0} AppHost...
trans-unit.target: Creating {0} AppHost...

trans-unit.source: Initialize Aspire in an existing codebase.
trans-unit.target: Инициализируйте поддержку Aspire в существующем решении или создайте однофайловый AppHost.

trans-unit.source: Failed to add AppHost project to solution. Exit code: {0}
trans-unit.target: Failed to add AppHost project to solution. Exit code: {0}

trans-unit.source: Failed to add reference to {0}.
trans-unit.target: Failed to add reference to {0}.

trans-unit.source: Failed to add ServiceDefaults reference to {0}.
trans-unit.target: Failed to add ServiceDefaults reference to {0}.

trans-unit.source: Failed to add ServiceDefaults project to solution. Exit code: {0}
trans-unit.target: Failed to add ServiceDefaults project to solution. Exit code: {0}

trans-unit.source: Failed to create Aspire projects. Exit code: {0}
trans-unit.target: Failed to create Aspire projects. Exit code: {0}

trans-unit.source: Failed to find created AppHost or ServiceDefaults projects in template output.
trans-unit.target: Failed to find created AppHost or ServiceDefaults projects in template output.

trans-unit.source: Failed to get projects from solution.
trans-unit.target: Failed to get projects from solution.

trans-unit.source: Failed to install Aspire templates.
trans-unit.target: Failed to install Aspire templates.

trans-unit.source: Multiple solution files found. Please select which one to add the Aspire projects to:
trans-unit.target: Найдено несколько файлов решений. Выберите, к какому из них добавить проекты Aspire:

trans-unit.source: No solution file found. Creating single-file AppHost...
trans-unit.target: Файл решения не найден. Создание однофайлового AppHost...

trans-unit.source: Resolving template version...
trans-unit.target: Resolving template version...

trans-unit.source: Run 'aspire run' to start your AppHost.
trans-unit.target: Run 'aspire run' to start your AppHost.

trans-unit.source: Single-file AppHost template not found.
trans-unit.target: Single-file AppHost template not found.

trans-unit.source: Solution detected: {0}
trans-unit.target: Обнаружено решение: {0}

trans-unit.source: Solution has already been initialized with Aspire.
trans-unit.target: Решение уже инициализировано с помощью Aspire.

trans-unit.source: The solution file '{0}' and project file '{1}' are in the same directory. The AppHost and ServiceDefaults projects cannot be created inside an existing project directory. Move the solution file to a parent directory or the project file to a subdirectory.
trans-unit.target: The solution file '{0}' and project file '{1}' are in the same directory. The AppHost and ServiceDefaults projects cannot be created inside an existing project directory. Move the solution file to a parent directory or the project file to a subdirectory.

trans-unit.source: Unknown language: {0}
trans-unit.target: Unknown language: {0}
